## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Stephen Karaolis (Outbound) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) in AI-driven marketing automation and outbound services.](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both Stephen and Marcel have pivoted from traditional marketing roles to AI-driven automation services, seeing significant market opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [fwd.digital has rapidly grown to 24 clients and \~$3M ARR in a few months, focusing on various marketing workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Outbound is in early stages (8 weeks) with 4 clients, developing custom AI-driven outbound and content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Potential synergy exists, with fwd.digital seeking someone to lead their outbound services vertical](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

## Topics

### Background and Career Trajectories

  - [Stephen: 11+ years in PR, ran own agency, pivoted to in-house at Cleary, now launching Outbound for marketing/GTM automations](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [Marcel: Ex-IBM/HP, built major content programs, led marketing at high-growth startups (HashiCorp, ServiceNow), launched fwd.digital while CMO at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

### fwd.digital's Rapid Growth

  - [Started as side project while Marcel was CMO at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Scaled DeepGram traffic from 1k to 30k daily visitors using AI + human-in-loop](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Launched paid workshops, quickly acquired clients](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Now at 24 clients, approaching $3M ARR, 15 employees](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Working with major clients like Reddit, Ramp, Hajan](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Outbound's Current Focus

  - [8 weeks in, 4 clients acquired](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Developing custom AI-driven outbound strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Scraping case studies to inform ICP](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Personalizing by title, company size, and ICP](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Creating custom language for different scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Content strategy: 1-on-1 video interviews, repurposed across formats](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Market Opportunity and Challenges

  - [Both see huge potential in AI-driven marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Challenge: Finding domain experts who are "AI native"](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Opportunity to disrupt traditional agency model](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Need to balance customization with scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [fwd.digital seeking someone to lead outbound services vertical](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Stephen open to exploring partnership, weighing pros/cons of joining vs. building solo](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Marcel suggests reconvening after holidays to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stephen to consider potential collaboration options](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Marcel to share additional thoughts on partnership](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Reconnect after holidays to explore concrete next steps](https://fathom.video/share/ncgkA4i95y6SFVSmsyQuXP5pz7617e9E?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
